heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Akira Kurosawa. Written by Shinobu Hashimoto, Ryūzō Kikushima, Akira Kurosawa, and Hideo Oguni, based on Macbeth by William Shakespeare.
clean: Directed by Akira Kurosawa. Written by Shinobu Hashimoto, Ryūzō Kikushima, Akira Kurosawa, and Hideo Oguni, based on Macbeth by William Shakespeare.

heading: Taketori Washizu
raw: Cowards! I see it now! You'll slay me and offer my head when you surrender!
clean: Cowards! I see it now! You'll slay me and offer my head when you surrender!

heading: Taketori Washizu
raw: [glances up from his drink and suddenly pales as he sees the ghost of Miki] There he is again! If you hate me, why not draw your sword? [He charges, swiping again and again with his sword]
clean: There he is again! If you hate me, why not draw your sword?

heading: Lady Asaji Washizu
raw: Admirable, my Lord. You, who would soon rule the world, allow a ghost to frighten you.
clean: Admirable, my Lord. You, who would soon rule the world, allow a ghost to frighten you.

heading: Lady Asaji Washizu
raw: Without ambition, man is not man.
clean: Without ambition, man is not man.

heading: Lady Asaji Washizu
raw: I did not stain my hands with blood to forward Yoshiteru, Miki's son.
clean: I did not stain my hands with blood to forward Yoshiteru, Miki's son.

heading: Lady Asaji Washizu
raw: Listen, even the crow is saying: The throne is yours.
clean: Listen, even the crow is saying: The throne is yours.

heading: Yoshiaki Miki
raw: What warrior would not want to be lord of a mighty castle?
clean: What warrior would not want to be lord of a mighty castle?

heading: Old Ghost Woman
raw: You humans! Never will I comprehend you. You are afraid of your desires - you try to hide them.
clean: You humans! Never will I comprehend you. You are afraid of your desires - you try to hide them.

heading: Old Ghost Woman
raw: If you choose ambition, lord, then choose it honestly, with cruelty.
clean: If you choose ambition, lord, then choose it honestly, with cruelty.

heading: Old Ghost Woman
raw: If you would make a mountain of the dead, pile it so it reaches the sky.
clean: If you would make a mountain of the dead, pile it so it reaches the sky.

heading: Old Ghost Woman
raw: If you would shed blood, then let it run as a river.
clean: If you would shed blood, then let it run as a river.

heading: Other
raw: Washizu soldier: A message from Lady Asaji! "If arrows cannot open the gates, then a corpse will."
clean: A message from Lady Asaji! "If arrows cannot open the gates, then a corpse will."

heading: Other
raw: Washizu samurai: I have fought in many battles and have seen blood, yet this stain horrifies me. Because this is the blood of a dog, the blood of a despised traitor. He was a coward too. Cried for mercy after his revolt was over.
clean: I have fought in many battles and have seen blood, yet this stain horrifies me. Because this is the blood of a dog, the blood of a despised traitor. He was a coward too. Cried for mercy after his revolt was over.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Taketori Washizu: Miki would never speak of it. He is my best friend.
clean: Miki would never speak of it. He is my best friend.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lady Asaji Washizu: He is ambitious. Children kill their parents for less. This is a wicked world. To save yourself you often first must kill. It is possible that Miki has already betrayed you. I fear this.
clean: He is ambitious. Children kill their parents for less. This is a wicked world. To save yourself you often first must kill. It is possible that Miki has already betrayed you. I fear this.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lady Asaji Washizu: Will it never be gone? The blood. I wash and wash, yet the blood remains - and the smell! Will my hands never again be clean?
clean: Will it never be gone? The blood. I wash and wash, yet the blood remains - and the smell! Will my hands never again be clean?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Taketori Washizu: Asaji!
clean: Asaji!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lady Asaji Washizu: There is still blood. My hands. Why do they not become clean? I wash and wash, still they smell of blood.
clean: There is still blood. My hands. Why do they not become clean? I wash and wash, still they smell of blood.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Taketori Washizu: Asaji!
clean: Asaji!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Washizu Guard #1: I cannot believe that this castle is as strong as it was.
clean: Washizu Guard #1: I cannot believe that this castle is as strong as it was.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Washizu Guard #2: I heard something, too. The rats have begun to leave.
clean: Washizu Guard #2: I heard something, too. The rats have begun to leave.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Washizu Guard #3: It is said that rats leave the house just before it burns.
clean: Washizu Guard #3: It is said that rats leave the house just before it burns.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoshiaki Miki: Can you see the future as I see you?
clean: Can you see the future as I see you?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Old Ghost Woman: Honorable Captain Miki. You are in command of Fort Two. Today you will take command of Fort One.
clean: Honorable Captain Miki. You are in command of Fort Two. Today you will take command of Fort One.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoshiaki Miki: Command of Fort One?
clean: Command of Fort One?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoshiaki Miki: And what then?
clean: And what then?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Old Ghost Woman: Your luck turns slower... but it lasts longer than that of Captain Washizu.
clean: Your luck turns slower... but it lasts longer than that of Captain Washizu.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoshiaki Miki: Slower? How do you mean?
clean: Slower? How do you mean?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Old Ghost Woman: Your son will eventually become the Lord of Cobweb Castle.
clean: Your son will eventually become the Lord of Cobweb Castle.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoshiaki Miki: My only wish would be a long, quiet sleep.
clean: My only wish would be a long, quiet sleep.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Taketori Washizu: I feel I am already sleeping and have had a frightening dream. What that witch or spirit said, that is what I dream of.
clean: I feel I am already sleeping and have had a frightening dream. What that witch or spirit said, that is what I dream of.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Yoshiaki Miki: We dream of what we wish.
clean: We dream of what we wish.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Taketori Washizu: His Lordship trusts me more than anyone else. And that is why he has given me the honor of leading the attack.
clean: His Lordship trusts me more than anyone else. And that is why he has given me the honor of leading the attack.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lady Asaji Washizu: Where arrows will find you not only from the front but from the rear.
clean: Where arrows will find you not only from the front but from the rear.
